title: trifolium benghalense
intro: Trifolium benghalense, also known as Bengal clover or Trifolium benghalense, is a perennial legume plant native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Trifolium benghalense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used as a dietary supplement to support overall health and well-being.
